tip: Set a specific study time every day. Consistency builds habit loops.
Read out loud! It strengthens muscle memory in your tongue and lips.
Double-tap or select any word to translate it instantly and add it to SRS.
Don't fear mistakes. Errors are proof that you are trying and learning.
Revise your SRS flashcard deck daily. SM-2 algorithm manages optimal recall intervals.
Practice dialogue roleplay. Shadowing native speakers boosts pronunciation speed.
Watch CaseOh reactions without English subtitles once a week to test raw listening.
Write short diary entries of at least 80 words to practice structured grammar.
Check your progress graphs. Witnessing growth boosts retention by 20%.
Favorite Clairo or Spotify songs to build your custom lyrics learning playlist.
